tasks.title: Add MCP config storage helper
tasks.description: Create a server-side helper for resolving, creating, reading, validating, and atomically writing /data/canvas-agent/mcp.json.

tasks.title: Create default mcp.json when missing
tasks.description: Write the basic default JSON config if the file does not exist, preserving 0600 permissions.

tasks.title: Validate permissive config shape
tasks.description: Validate JSON parsing and obvious top-level shape mistakes while preserving unknown fields for future MCP options.

tasks.title: Extend CodeEditor for settings usage
tasks.description: Add an optional path or language prop so Settings can use JSON highlighting without mutating the workspace file-store.

tasks.title: Add MCP card to Integrations settings
tasks.description: Add a Settings > Integrations card with path, format, secret guidance, save/reload controls, and inline JSON validation errors.

tasks.title: Add authenticated MCP config API
tasks.description: Create GET and PUT handlers for loading and saving the raw MCP JSON config with session checks and rate limits.

tasks.title: Apply Step 1 security constraints
tasks.description: Ensure Step 1 does not interpolate env vars, store OAuth tokens, write outside the config path, or echo secret-looking malformed values.

tasks.title: Add config storage and API tests
tasks.description: Cover missing-file default creation, invalid JSON rejection, valid JSON preservation, atomic writes, and permissions where supported.

tasks.title: Verify Step 1 implementation
tasks.description: Run npm build and perform a browser-based Settings smoke check when this UI step is implemented.
